en: Amber will take the composition. Cher will be pro.
Like right now, for example, the Hadeans need to come to America.
But some people are all, what about the strain on our resources?
But it's like, when I had this garden party for my father's birthday, right?
ko: 하지만 제가 아버지 생신에 정원 파티를 했을 때처럼요,

en: I said RSVP because it was a sit-down dinner.
ko: 저는 앉아서 먹는 저녁이었기 때문에 RSVP를 요청했어요.

en: But people came that, like, did not RSVP.
ko: 그런데 RSVP를 하지 않은 사람들이 왔어요.

en: So I was, like, totally buggin'.
I had to haul ass to the kitchen, redistribute the food, squish in extra place settings.
But by the end of the day, it was like, the more, the merrier.
And so, if the government could just get to the kitchen, rearrange some things,
ko: 그래서 정부가 부엌에 가서 몇 가지를 재조정한다면,

en: we could certainly party with the Hadeans.
ko: 우리는 하데안들과 함께 파티를 할 수 있을 거예요.

en: And in conclusion, may I please remind you that it does not say RSVP on the Statue of Liberty.
